def positive_callable_annotation_without_parameter_types():
    rule_id = "callable_annotation_without_parameter_types"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Callable annotation used without explicit parameter types, losing type information downstream."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
